pages.summary:
This Privacy Policy applies to the app Cloud Music Offline Listening.

Cloud Music Offline Listening is a music player app that allows users to import audio files from cloud storage services, WiFi transfer, iTunes File Sharing, iCloud, and local files, then play and manage those music files offline inside the app.

Your privacy is important to us. We designed this app to work mainly on your device, and we do not collect personal information from users.
pages.text:
this privacy policy applies to the app cloud music offline listening.
cloud music offline listening is a music player app that allows users to import audio files from cloud storage services, wifi transfer, itunes file sharing, icloud, and local files, then play and manage those music files offline inside the app.
your privacy is important to us. we designed this app to work mainly on your device, and we do not collect personal information from users.
information we do not collect we do not collect, store, sell, or share your personal information.
this includes, but is not limited to:
your name email address phone number home address contacts photos calendar information personal documents music files imported into the app playlists created inside the app cloud storage account passwords your imported music files and playlists are used only for playback and management inside the app. we do not upload your music files to our own servers.
cloud storage access cloud music offline listening may allow you to connect to third-party cloud storage services such as google drive, dropbox, onedrive, or icloud.
when you choose to connect a cloud service, the connection is used only to let you browse, import, and download your own music files into the app.
we do not receive or store your cloud account password. authentication is handled by the relevant cloud service provider. your use of those services is also subject to their own privacy policies and terms.
local music and offline playback music files imported into the app are stored locally on your device so that you can play them offline.
we do not monitor the content of your music files. we do not analyze your music library for advertising, tracking, or profiling purposes.
wifi transfer and file import if you use wifi transfer, itunes file sharing, icloud, or other file import methods, the files you import are used only for local playback and playlist management.
we do not collect or transmit these files to our servers.
non-personal information the app may process limited technical information necessary for normal app operation, such as app settings, playback status, playlist structure, or local file information.
this information is used only to provide app features and improve the user experience. it is not used to personally identify you.
advertising the app may display ads through third-party advertising services such as google admob.
advertising providers may collect or process certain device or usage information in order to provide, measure, and improve ads. this may include information such as device identifiers, ip address, app interactions, approximate location, or advertising-related data, depending on your device settings and consent choices.
we do not sell your personal information. any data collected by advertising providers is handled according to their own privacy policies.
you can learn more about how google uses information for advertising from google’s privacy and advertising policies.
third-party services the app may use third-party services for cloud storage access, advertising, analytics, or app functionality.
these services may collect information according to their own privacy policies. we are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party services, websites, or links.
examples of third-party services may include:
google drive dropbox onedrive icloud google admob data security we take reasonable steps to protect user privacy and keep the app experience safe.
because the app is designed mainly for local music playback, your imported music files and playlists remain on your device unless you choose to use external cloud services or transfer methods.
please keep your device, apple id, and cloud storage accounts secure.
children’s privacy cloud music offline listening does not knowingly collect personal information from children.
if you believe that a child has provided personal information through the app, please contact us and we will take appropriate action.
changes to this privacy policy we may update this privacy policy from time to time. if we make important changes, we will update this page with the latest version.
your continued use of the app after changes are posted means you accept the updated privacy policy.
pages.title: Privacy Policy

pages.summary:
Unlock the infinite possibilities of music and enjoy your favorite tunes!

Key Features

  • Easily import and play your favorite music anytime, anywhere! No need for the Internet, no restrictions!
  • Get your music from Google Drive, Dropbox, or OneDrive cloud storage.
  • Import music via WiFi transfer (PC/Mac), iTunes File Sharing, and iCloud.
  • Support for various audio formats: .mp3, .flac, .wav, .caf, .aac, and more.
  • Listen to music offline at any time; no internet or WiFi connection is required.
  • Create, rename, edit playlists, and more.
  • Control music playback with headphones at any time.
  • Background music playback.
  • Lock screen control support.
pages.text:
unlock the infinite possibilities of music and enjoy your favorite tunes!
key features easily import and play your favorite music anytime, anywhere! no need for the internet, no restrictions! get your music from google drive, dropbox, or onedrive cloud storage. import music via wifi transfer (pc/mac), itunes file sharing, and icloud. support for various audio formats: .mp3, .flac, .wav, .caf, .aac, and more. listen to music offline at any time; no internet or wifi connection is required. create, rename, edit playlists, and more. control music playback with headphones at any time. background music playback. lock screen control support. music player powerful media player to meet various needs. sleep timer to stop music playback when you fall asleep. lock screen music control for convenient operation. background music playback so you can continue enjoying music while using other apps. playlist support for single songs, repeat lists, and shuffle play. whether you’re playing music in an offline environment or downloading music from cloud storage, our music player meets your needs. let music be your unlimited treasure trove!
